headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Monday's pre-market session.
summary: As we await the opening of the US market on Monday, let's delve into the pre-market session and discover the S&P500 top gainers and losers shaping the early market sentiment.

headline: Apollo, Digital Realty Trust And Archer-Daniels-Midland On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Apollo Global shares rose 1.4% to close at $130.46 on Friday, while Archer-Daniels-Midland shares gained 0.5% to settle at $74.94.
